name: Remove Duplicates from Sorted Doubly Linked List
description: Given a sorted doubly linked list, remove all duplicate nodes so that each value appears only once. Return the modified list.
constraints: The number of nodes is in [0, 300]. -100 <= Node.val <= 100. The list is sorted.

performance.stress_intent: exercise long sorted duplicate runs that punish nested duplicate elimination instead of one forward deduplication pass
